历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16619 → 17768 → 18037 → 17944 → 20633, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 2689 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 20633. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 46, 47, 46, 48, 48 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 48, unchanged from 2025, with no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 84th, with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 75 and 84, overall stable. The university is not included in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, indicating no significant negative public opinion or discontinuation events in recent years, with stable admission expectations. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top nationally), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, giving it strong academic appeal in the power industry, continuously attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing (estimated at about 129,800 based on historical proportion) decreased by about 6.9% compared to 2025 (139,500), slightly easing competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 undergraduate batch was 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a 6.9% decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, and stable disciplinary advantages, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly recover (ranking number decreases, competition eases slightly). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20433, with a range of 19933–20933.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19933), you can focus on aiming for top-tier majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 20933), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and cautiously choose Tier 2.
